headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero headings, and feature names. Letter-spacing: tight.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, navigation, buttons, and UI elements. Letter-spacing: normal.

colors.palette_instructions: Use 'Secondary' (#F5F0EB) for section backgrounds to create warmth. Use 'Accent' (#D4AF37) sparingly for buttons or key highlights. 'Primary' (#1A1A1A) is for text and high-contrast elements.

layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (refer to MODE A in principles)
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use p-12, p-16, p-24 for section padding.

buttons.style: Pill-shaped or soft rounded corners (rounded-full or rounded-xl).

variants.outline: border border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white transition-colors duration-300

cards.style: Flat with subtle border (border-[#E5E5E5]) or soft shadow (shadow-sm). Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md.

inputs.style: bg-[#F5F0EB] border-transparent focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-0 rounded-xl px-4 py-3

hero.alt: Majestic white Persian cat lounging luxuriously

grooming.alt: Professional grooming service with hair dryer

technical_instructions.map_embed: Use an iframe with src='https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d3624.787679366666!2d46.730!3d24.700!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x0%3A0x0!2zMjTCsDQyJzAwLjAiTiA0NsKwNDMnNDguMCJF!5e0!3m2!1sen!2ssa!4v1625640000000!5m2!1sen!2ssa' (This is a generic Riyadh central coordinate. Add a note below map: 'Umar Ibn Abdul Aziz Branch Rd, Az Zahra, Riyadh 12812')

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' font for headings.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Maintain a 4.5:1 contrast ratio for text.
